Standard Motor Products announces expansion of Standard® Gasoline Fuel Injector program with 100% new injectors.

news.headline: US FDA approves TREMFYA® for Crohn's disease, offering subcutaneous and intravenous options. Demonstrated clinical remission and endoscopic response at one year, supported by GALAXI study. TREMFYA® shows superiority versus STELARA® in all endoscopic endpoints.
news.summary: TREMFYA® is the sole IL-23 inhibitor that has shown clinical remission and endoscopic response at the one-year mark through a fully subcutaneous induction regimen. Backed by findings from the GALAXI study, TREMFYA® stands out as the singular IL-23 inhibitor to exhibit superiority compared to STELARA® across all combined endoscopic endpoints, with significant data supporting its efficacy.

news.headline: Venezuela: US State Department Blocking Migration Flights
Foran Mining Corp. announced filing 2024 financials, including annual information form, supporting greener future. (281 words)
news.summary: Foran Mining Corporation has released its annual financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company, listed on TSX as FOM and on OTCQX as FMCXF, focuses on copper-zinc-gold-silver exploration and development. Their key project, McIlvenna Bay, is situated within the traditional territory of the Peter Ballantyne Cree Nation and hosts the McIlvenna Bay Deposit and Tesla Zone. The company's other asset is the Bigstone Deposit, located 25 km southwest of McIlvenna Bay. The McIlvenna Bay Deposit aims to become the focal point of a new mining camp in an area with a rich mining history. The property is 65 km West of Flin Flon, Manitoba. The company's complete financial statements and related documents for 2024 are available on SEDAR and their website.

news.headline: Decidr AI partners with AWS for AI transformation, accepted into APJ FasTrack Academy - key info: ASX: DAI, global businesses impacted.
news.summary: In Sydney, Decidr AI Industries Ltd (ASX: DAI) has revealed that Decidr.ai Pty Ltd has entered a strategic partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to enhance AI-driven business innovation and the integration of Decidr Agentic technology. As part of the agreement, AWS will act as Decidr's primary cloud infrastructure provider, facilitating the smooth rollout of AI Agents, data analytics, and operational automation for organizations globally. This collaboration aims to leverage AWS's extensive cloud capabilities to drive technological advancements and streamline business processes on a global scale.

news.headline: SEC clarified that Bitcoin and Dogecoin are not securities as per proof-of-work mining. Decision announced Thursday. Characters: 112
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) clarified on Thursday that crypto mining activities utilizing proof-of-work methods, such as those associated with popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Dogecoin, are not considered securities according to its regulatory framework. This decision is likely to impact numerous cryptocurrency miners and enthusiasts involved in these particular blockchain networks.

news.headline: FIFCO USA unveils $28M can line at Genesee Brewery, producing 1,500 cans/min, generating 15M+ cases yearly.
news.summary: Rochester, NY - On March 20, 2025, FIFCO USA marked the introduction of its new canning line by producing an impressive 1,500 cans per minute. This state-of-the-art technology is expected to yield over 15 million cases of supplemental brewery production on an annual basis. The parent company of Genesee Brewery invested $28 million in this innovative project, which was commemorated with a ribbon-cutting ceremony.

news.headline: Canacol Energy Ltd. posted $296 million adjusted EBITDAX for 2024. Revenues increased to $352.3 million, with net cash capital expenditures at $122.3 million. The company aims for EBITDA growth, gas exploration, debt reduction, Bolivia operations in 2026, and sustainability.
news.summary: Canacol Energy Ltd. reported financial and operating results for the three months and year ended December 31, 2024. Adjusted EBITDAX increased 43% and 25% to $76.1 million and $296.1 million, respectively. Adjusted funds from operations rose 68% and 43% to $52.1 million and $209.4 million. Natural gas and LNG operating netback increased 39% and 32%, with total revenues up 23% and 16% to $98.3 million and $352.3 million. Realized contractual natural gas sales volume decreased by 4% and 12%. The Corporation reported a net loss of $25.4 million and $32.7 million. Net cash capital expenditures for the year ended 2024 amounted to $122.3 million. Canacol had $79.2 million in cash and $45.5 million in working capital surplus. In 2025, the Corporation plans to focus on maintaining and growing EBITDA generation, exploring gas opportunities, reducing debt, preparing for operations in Bolivia in 2026, and continuing the commitment to its ESG strategy. Planned activities include drilling exploration and development wells, installing new facilities, and optimizing production to support robust EBITDA generation. Operating in Bolivia is pending ratification, and exploration projects in the Middle Magdalena Valley and MMV are also in progress. The Corporation will evaluate options for the Pola project. Financial highlights show increases in total revenues, adjusted EBITDAX, and adjusted funds from operations for 2024 compared to 2023.

news.headline: Canacol Energy Ltd. reports 2P reserves of 599 Bcfe worth US$2.6B BTAX and 10-year reserve life index in 2024.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 20, 2025, Canacol Energy Ltd. announced its conventional natural gas, light, medium, and heavy crude oil reserves, and deemed volumes as of December 31, 2024. The Corporation, listed on TSX as CNE, OTCQX as CNNEF, and BVC as CNEC, revealed that its natural gas reserves are situated in the Lower Magdalena Valley basin in Colombia. Canacol also disclosed having light and medium crude oil reserves in the Middle Magdalena Valley basin, with additional light, medium, and heavy crude oil reserves and deemed volumes in the Llanos basin, all located in Colombia.

news.headline: Earthworms studied for vermifiltration at Vermitech Innovation Center in Walla Walla for sustainable wastewater treatment.
news.summary: In Walla Walla, Washington, on March 20, 2025, an innovative approach to wastewater treatment is gaining attention. Industries and municipalities are turning to earthworms as a sustainable solution for this crucial process. Through vermifiltration, which harnesses the power of these creatures, significant improvements have been observed. This method is proving to be reliable and effective, highlighting the potential of earthworms in addressing environmental challenges. Stay tuned for more updates on this eco-friendly initiative.

news.headline: European dermatology company sought regulatory support from DelveInsight to navigate CDSCO framework for market-ready product launch in India.
news.summary: A prominent European dermatology company recently utilized regulatory intelligence services to navigate the CDSCO framework in India. Their goal was to acquire a thorough understanding of the guidelines, requirements, and approval processes necessary to launch their product in the Indian market. This strategic move highlights the significance of seeking regulatory guidance when entering new markets.

news.headline: Bitcoin price surged to $87,453 but dipped to $83,655 post-Trump video at Digital Asset Summit. Traders cautious for a possible pullback to $73,700.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) surged to an intraday high of $87,453 before dropping to $83,655 after US President Trump's video appearance at the Digital Asset Summit in NY. Rumors of capital gains tax relief for certain cryptocurrencies were debunked. Trump reiterated not selling confiscated Bitcoins and urged Congress to enact stablecoin legislation quickly. Market reaction was negative as traders sold off. BTC may correct to $73,700 according to analyst Aksel Kibar. Recent price strength is partly due to FOMC minutes on March 19 and Fed Chair Powell's remarks on quantitative tightening. BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes noted QT's potential end on April 1, with caution on possible stock and BTC volatility. Futures markets heavily influenced BTC's recent price, but a resurgence in the BTC Coinbase premium suggests spot demand is picking up. Hayes advised caution and staying cashed up amidst potential volatility. President Trump's statement on making the US a "Bitcoin superpower" also impacted BTC price.

news.headline: Speculators scale back 2025 rate-cut bets as inflation fears rise ahead of March Fed meeting. Most favored scenario now foresees two cuts at 24% probability. Fed signals two cuts in 2025. Retail bettors cautious, financial markets slightly more hopeful.
news.summary: Speculators are reevaluating their expectations for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts in 2025, with a focus on the March Federal Open Market Committee meeting. Traders on the Kalshi platform are moving their bets towards fewer than three rate cuts, particularly favoring the scenario of two cuts with a 24% implied probability. The chances of only one rate cut have increased to 19%. Retail bettors are also leaning towards two rate cuts, with a 24% implied probability. In December, the Fed's "dot plot" showed a median expectation of two rate cuts for 2025, down from four in September. While retail bettors are becoming more conservative, broader financial markets are still slightly more optimistic. Fed funds futures on the CME FedWatch tool currently indicate a full pricing of three rate cuts by December 2024, with a 35% probability.
